Thanks for the PR. For non-trivial changes please link to a previously
agreed issue. Drive-by feature PRs without prior discussion are likely to
be closed — see CONTRIBUTING.md.

## Summary

## Linked issue

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint format typecheck test audit` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior has a test (unit or integration)
- [ ] No new runtime dependency, **or** the new dep is justified in the description
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` (if user-visible)
- [ ] Updated relevant `docs/` page (if user-visible)
- [ ] Did not remove or weaken the upstream `attribution` / `unaffiliated` fields
- [ ] Did not change the trademark / license notices in `LICENSE` or `README.md` without asking
